trigger: Before starting a Gemini CLI session that changes workflow assets
When validating governance workflow behavior from a Gemini-compatible runtime

native_entry.projection_rule: GEMINI.md is a thin pointer to skills/software-project-governance/SKILL.md; it must not duplicate workflow rules.

ask_user_question.evidence: Current Gemini CLI validation is blocked by auth and does not prove a native AskUserQuestion-equivalent tool.
ask_user_question.degraded_mode: Block interaction-boundary closure or route through the outer host conversation with degraded evidence.

sub_agent.evidence: Current Gemini CLI adapter has no verified sub-agent delegation path.
sub_agent.degraded_mode: Do not claim Producer-Reviewer separation from Gemini runtime alone; require external review evidence.

tool_calling.evidence: Gemini CLI tool access depends on auth and CLI configuration; current real runtime E2E is blocked by auth.
tool_calling.degraded_mode: Use local validation scripts outside Gemini until auth and tool access pass runtime E2E.

browser.evidence: No browser automation path is verified for the Gemini CLI adapter.
browser.degraded_mode: Mark browser validation blocked or run it from another host adapter.

mcp.evidence: MCP support depends on user Gemini CLI configuration and has not been verified in this adapter.
mcp.degraded_mode: Use local scripts and record MCP unavailable when not configured.

git_hooks.evidence: Git hooks are repository-level controls independent of Gemini auth state.

workflow_closure.evidence: Gemini entry projection exists, but auth/runtime and Agent Team capabilities remain blocked or unverified.

runtime_e2e.evidence: Local Gemini CLI command returned version 0.35.3.

target_cwd_e2e.evidence: Executed from project/e2e-test-project cwd and returned Test Project status with default-confirm permission mode.

agent_runtime_e2e.command: gemini --prompt "Read .governance/plan-tracker.md in the current working directory and answer exactly: E2E_STAGE=<current stage text>. Do not modify files." --approval-mode plan --output-format text
agent_runtime_e2e.blocked_reason: Gemini auth missing or not configured; configure GEMINI_API_KEY, GOOGLE_API_KEY, Vertex credentials, GCA auth, or Gemini settings auth before claiming full E2E.
agent_runtime_e2e.evidence: FIX-106 real agent runtime matrix command exited non-zero with auth missing/401 semantics before model execution.

auth_preflight.blocked_reason: Gemini auth missing or not configured
auth_preflight.evidence: Local Gemini CLI is on PATH and `gemini --version` returns 0.35.3, but no recognized GEMINI_API_KEY, GOOGLE_API_KEY, Vertex, GCA, or Gemini settings auth source is configured on this host.
auth_preflight.remediation: Set GEMINI_API_KEY or GOOGLE_API_KEY, configure Vertex credentials, configure GCA auth, or login/configure Gemini CLI settings.json with an auth provider/token type; do not record secret values.
